name: Carob Chip Cookies #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Cream the butter, honey, egg, and vanilla.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture.
4. Add the carob chips and nuts.
5. Drop by teaspoons onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F oven for 10 to 12 minutes.
7. Makes 3 dozen.
8. If they spread out too much when baking, refrigerate the dough before placing on cookie sheet.
